metadata.title: Kvalifits — recruitment built on verified skills
metadata.description: Employers and specialists in one skills-first system. Verified competencies, clear fit.

nav.seekerAreaSubtitle: Manage your seeker profile and certificates.
nav.employerAreaSubtitle: Manage your company profile and job posts.
nav.areaNotImplementedYet: This area is being built. In the meantime, role-based navigation and access control are already in place.

hero.subheadline: Skills visible. Fit visible. Without the noise.

heroMockup.fitExplanation: Your fit for this role is 87%.
heroMockup.fitExplanationSecondary: Fit is calculated from candidate data and role requirements.
heroMockup.compareLine: Comparison between the candidate profile and role requirements
heroMockup.lineHint: A quick view of the key fit signals
heroMockup.verifiedHint: A key qualification has been verified
heroMockup.requirementsHint: The candidate meets 8 out of 10 requirements
heroMockup.explainSeekerText: This shows the candidate role, qualifications, and the key signals derived from their profile.
heroMockup.explainFitText: Your fit for this role is 87%. The result is based on comparing the candidate profile and role requirements.
heroMockup.explainEmployerText: This shows the role and expectations defined by the employer.
heroMockup.explainVerifiedText: A key certificate or qualification has been detected in the system and included in the match.
heroMockup.explainRequirementsText: The candidate meets 8 out of 10 requirements, giving a quick snapshot of fit.

smartMatching.title: Smart matching
smartMatching.subtitle: Proof, requirements and fit in one clear signal.

why.title: Trust isn’t a slogan.
why.subtitle: Competence and decisions grounded in evidence — not gut feel alone.
why.b2Desc: Employers decide with confidence. Specialists aren’t constantly proving themselves.
why.b3Desc: Competencies and certificates that actually matter here.

audience.title: Two roles.
audience.subtitle: Skills on one side, requirements on the other — the same interpretation.
audience.step2Line: Licences and certificates in one profile.
audience.step3Line: A percentage and a reason — not a guess.
audience.employerPricingHint: One package, one price — start hiring with clarity.

finalCta.subtitle: Profile ready. The right signals first.

jobs.title: Jobs
jobs.description: Find roles that match your real skills — verified competence and clear fit.
jobs.heroTitle: Find work that fits your real skills.
jobs.heroSubtitle: Filter by certificates, qualifications and experience — and see fit clearly, without noise or guesswork.

employers.title: For employers
employers.description: Hire with confidence: verified skills, clear fit and an employer account on Kvalifits.
employers.heroTitle: Hire with confidence — competence is visible.
employers.heroSubtitle: Kvalifits brings you candidates whose skills and evidence are structured and verifiable. Less noise, more certainty before the first call.
employers.ctaHint: One account for job posts and candidate overview. Creating an account is free.
employers.sectionLead: As an employer you need clarity: who really fits and why. Kvalifits puts requirements and competence in the same language — less room for error.
employers.sectionBody: Suited to companies hiring specialists, tradespeople and roles where licences and certificates matter. The platform evolves with your feedback.
employers.d1Text: Title, location, working pattern and skill requirements in one view — candidates know fast if they fit.
employers.d2Text: Certificates and licences visible on the profile; less guesswork before the first call.
employers.d3Text: Fit score and interpretation help you choose faster who deserves your time.
employers.p1Desc: Define skills and certificates — not just keywords.
employers.p2Desc: See immediately what’s verified and how well it fits.
employers.p3Desc: Feedback and verification steadily improve quality.

seekers.title: For job seekers
seekers.description: Make your skills visible: profile, evidence and matches on Kvalifits.
seekers.heroTitle: Your skills are valuable — make them visible.
seekers.heroSubtitle: Kvalifits helps you present experience and evidence in a structured way so the right jobs and employers find you faster. One profile, clear competence, less clutter.
seekers.ctaHint: Profile, skills and certificate management plus matches will live in the same view — clean and clear. Creating an account is free.
seekers.sectionLead: As a job seeker you want strengths to show and conversations to start with the right roles. Kvalifits aligns your competence with employer requirements.
seekers.sectionBody: Especially if you hold licences, certificates or niche experience — where a CV alone doesn’t tell the full story. The platform grows over time.
seekers.d1Text: Experience, skills and roles in one view — so employers grasp who you are quickly.
seekers.d2Text: Certificates and licences on the profile; less CV games, more facts.
seekers.d3Text: See how well a specific opportunity matches your skills before you invest time.
seekers.p1Desc: Employers see structured proof of what you can do — not just buzzwords.
seekers.p2Desc: Fit and requirements speak the same language; fewer blind applications, smarter choices.
seekers.p3Desc: Verification and feedback help your profile strengthen over time.

auth.errorEmailInUse: An account with this email already exists.
auth.errorEmailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email and try again.
auth.errorRateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
auth.errorInvalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.errorWeakPassword: Your password is too weak. Please choose a stronger one.
auth.loginSubtitle: Use one account to manage job posts and your profile.
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email and we’ll send you a reset link.
auth.resetEmailSent: If this email exists in our system, we’ve sent a password reset link.
auth.resetPasswordSubtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
auth.accessBlockedSubtitle: Your account access is temporarily restricted.
auth.accessBlockedBody: If you believe this is a mistake, contact support@kvalifits.ee.
auth.alreadySignedIn: You’re already signed in. To create a new account, please log out first.
auth.registerSubtitle: Choose a role and create an account with email and password.
auth.signupNoUser: Sign-up succeeded, but no user was returned.
auth.onboardingSeekerSubtitle: Next you’ll add your profile and certificate info.
auth.onboardingEmployerSubtitle: Next you’ll add your company info and job details.
auth.onboardingNotImplementedYet: Onboarding is in progress. Your role and account records are already created.

onboarding.rlsError: Access denied (security policy). Please try again, or contact us if it persists.
onboarding.visibilityHint: If you turn visibility on, employers can discover your profile in the candidates view. If it’s off, your profile stays hidden and won’t appear in discovery.
onboarding.accountHint: To delete your account and data, send a request. For now, deletion requests are handled manually (safer and auditable).
onboarding.deleteAccountEmailBody: Hello! I would like to delete my Kvalifits account and the associated data. Please confirm the process and timeline.
onboarding.avatarFileOnlyHint: Add your photo only as a file (jpg, png, etc.). Pasting a URL is not allowed — the image is uploaded to Kvalifits storage and tied to your account.
onboarding.avatarUpload: Choose an image file from your device
onboarding.avatarUploadInProgress: Your profile photo is still uploading. Please wait until it finishes.
onboarding.avatarRequired: A profile photo is required: upload an image file (not an external link). If you had an old link-based photo, choose a new file.
onboarding.experienceLevelHint: Choose a structured level (used for future fit scoring).
onboarding.profileTitleHelp: Your desired role headline — separate from your full name so employers see your focus clearly.
onboarding.workAuthorizationHint: e.g. EU citizen, work permit valid until …
onboarding.certificateImageUploadHint: Upload an image or PDF. Alternatively paste a public URL in the field below.
onboarding.errProfileTitleTooShort: Add a clear desired role / title (at least 3 characters).
onboarding.errAboutTooShort: Your about text is too short. Add a concise summary of your experience (at least 40 characters).
onboarding.errCertificateIncomplete: Add at least one complete certificate (all fields + image or link).
onboarding.certificateUploadInProgress: The certificate image is still uploading. Please wait until it finishes.
onboarding.certificateImageUrlHint: Temporary link; uploads will be added soon
onboarding.errIndustryRequired: Please add an industry (at least 2 characters).
onboarding.errCompanyDescriptionTooShort: Company description is too short (at least 40 characters).
onboarding.logoUploadError: Logo upload failed. Please try again.

jobs.missingEmployerProfile: Company profile is missing. Complete employer onboarding first.
jobs.applySubtitle: We’ll email the employer your profile and contact details.
jobs.applyMessagePlaceholder: Write a short note to the employer…
jobs.applyConsent: I agree that by applying, my profile details and contact info (email, phone, CV link) will be shared with this employer.
jobs.applyConsentRequired: You must confirm consent to apply.
jobs.applySuccessBody: We emailed the employer your details.
jobs.applyLoginHint: To apply you must be signed in as a job seeker.
jobs.applyOnlySeekers: Applying is currently available only with a job seeker account.
jobs.applicantsLegacyScore: Score not stored for this application.
jobs.applicantsSortedHint: Sorted by match score — highest first. Open a row for the full breakdown.
jobs.applicantsClueRequirements: {matched} of {total} requirement lines show evidence in their profile
jobs.applicantsClueCertificates: {matched} of {total} qualification phrases align with their certificates
jobs.applicantsClueLocation: Location and work format look compatible with this post
jobs.applicantsEmptySubtitle: When seekers apply, they appear here with a transparent suitability score so you can compare candidates quickly.
jobs.applicantsIncompleteHint: Limited profile text was on file when they applied — open the detail view for the full snapshot.
jobs.applicantsRankHint: List order by suitability (1 = highest score here)
jobs.applicantHighlight_skillsStrong: Strong skill overlap with the role.
jobs.applicantHighlight_skillsPartial: Some skills align with the role.
jobs.applicantHighlight_experienceFit: Experience level aligns with what you asked for.
jobs.applicantHighlight_certificatesSignal: Certificates or keywords suggest a relevant background.
jobs.applicantHighlight_certificatesStrong: Certificates clearly match stated qualification expectations.
jobs.applicantHighlight_certificateGap: Stated certificate or qualification expectations are not clearly met.
jobs.applicantHighlight_roleAlignment: Desired role / title aligns with this job post.
jobs.applyDuplicate: You have already applied to this job.
jobs.applyProfileRequired: Complete your seeker profile before applying.
jobs.applicantMatchExplainFitText: The headline number is a fixed weighted sum (35% skills & keywords + requirement-line evidence, 25% certificates / qualification phrases, 15% experience ladder, 10% role title vs job title, 10% location, 5% job type & work format). It is deterministic — not AI. Bars show points earned out of each weight. Current score: {scoreLabel}.
jobs.applicantMatchExplainBreakdownText: Each bar is contribution points out of that component’s fixed weight (they sum to the headline percentage, up to rounding).
jobs.applicantMatchLegacyModel: This application was scored with an older model; bars are an approximate remap for display.
jobs.applicantMatchWeak_skills_keywords: Skills, keywords, or requirement-line evidence looks thin versus the post.
jobs.applicantMatchWeak_certificates: Certificate / qualification phrases from the post are not clearly reflected in the applicant’s certificates.
jobs.applicantMatchWeak_experience: Experience level is below what the post expects, or missing on one side.
jobs.applicantMatchWeak_role_title: Desired role / title overlap with the job title is limited.
jobs.applicantMatchWeak_location: Location signals do not align strongly (on-site roles are stricter).
jobs.applicantMatchWeak_work_job_type: Job type or work format fit is weak versus stated preferences.
jobs.applicantMatchNoSkills: No skills listed on the snapshot.
jobs.applicantMatchNoRequirementLines: No structured requirement lines on this post.
jobs.createSubtitle: Save a draft, choose a package, and test the flow. Payment will be connected later.
jobs.introBody: Fill in the fields below and choose a package. For now, the post is saved as a draft and payments will be added later.
jobs.jobFieldGuideIntro: Each section below has a short hint (how much and in what format). Required fields are marked; the form enforces minimums before publishing.
jobs.jobFieldGuideSummary: One short block (1–2 sentences). Minimum 20 characters. Shown in job listings and search.
jobs.jobFieldGuideDescription: Full job description (tasks, conditions, schedule, etc.). Minimum 40 characters. Blank lines separate paragraphs.
jobs.jobFieldGuideRequirementsExtra: One requirement per line. Minimum 2 lines. Be specific (e.g. licences, experience, environment) — each line is used line-by-line when scoring applicants.
jobs.jobFieldGuideSkills: Single line, comma-separated. At least 1 tag (e.g. B licence, AutoCAD). These are the clear “must-have” role tags.
jobs.jobFieldGuideKeywords: Also comma-separated, at least 1 tag. Used for search and matching (e.g. industry, tool, method). May overlap skills, but can include broader search terms.
jobs.jobFieldGuideExperience: Pick the experience level expected for this role (compared to the seeker profile).
jobs.jobFieldGuideCert: Optional. Short phrases separated by commas or semicolons (e.g. “Forklift licence, valid B category”). If empty, certificate matching can still use the “Keywords for search…” field.
jobs.jobFieldGuideSalary: Optional. Numbers only (e.g. 2300 and 2800); currency is usually EUR. Leave blank if unknown.
jobs.jobFieldGuideApplication: On Kvalifits: apply through the platform. External link: full https:// URL to your careers page or form.
jobs.jobFieldGuideEditLead: When editing, the same minimums and formats apply — see the hints under each field.
jobs.jobSchemaCacheCertFixHint: If this error comes from Supabase (e.g. a column is missing on job_posts): open SQL Editor and run supabase/scripts/fix-job-posts-certificate-requirements.sql. It adds the structured matching columns and runs NOTIFY pgrst to refresh PostgREST’s schema cache; wait a few seconds and try again.
jobs.publishHint: The post becomes public immediately and job seekers can apply. Payment will be connected later.
jobs.packageHint: Choose the listing duration. Later we’ll connect payment and expiration logic.
jobs.employerProfileIncomplete: Your company profile is incomplete. Please complete it before creating a job post.
jobs.employerProfileIncompleteBody: To create a job post you need: company name, contact email, location, industry, and a company description (at least 40 characters).
jobs.summaryPlaceholder: 1–2 sentences with the key points of the role.
jobs.jobRequirementLinesHint: At least 2 lines. Example: Valid B licence · 3+ years on-site experience …
jobs.jobRequirementLinesHelp: Each line becomes a structured requirement for later matching.
jobs.jobCertRequirementsPlaceholder: Comma- or line-separated, e.g. valid B licence; forklift certificate
jobs.errRequirementLines: Add at least two requirements (one per line).
jobs.errRequiredSkills: Add at least one required skill (comma-separated).
jobs.errShortSummary: Short summary is too short (at least 20 characters).
jobs.errDescriptionLength: Job description is too short (at least 40 characters).
jobs.jobMatchingIncomplete: Some required fields for publishing are still incomplete. Check the application URL and structured fields.
jobs.csvHintJobs: comma-separated, e.g. B licence, AutoCAD, team leadership
jobs.errApplicationUrlInvalid: Application URL must start with http:// or https://
jobs.myJobsSubtitle: View and manage your job posts.
jobs.noJobsYet: You don’t have any job posts yet.
jobs.deleteJobConfirm: Delete the job post "{title}"? This cannot be undone. Related applications will be removed as well.
jobs.title: Job title

jobsSearch.profileSignalsHint: Skills and signals most often added to profiles (top {count}). Soon you’ll see suggestions based on your profile too.
jobsSearch.noResults: Nothing matched these filters. Try removing one.
